site.title: Upskill Fleet Academy
site.heroHeadline: Build Future-Ready Skills in AI, Cyber Security, Cloud & Financial Markets
site.heroSubheading: Practical learning, industry insights, hands-on demonstrations, and career guidance from experienced professionals.
site.seoDescription: Upskill Fleet Academy — Real-world AI, Cyber Security, AWS Cloud & Financial Markets learning for students and professionals. Free masterclasses, premium bootcamps, and WhatsApp community.
site.scheduleNote: Live online sessions and practical learning experiences for students and working professionals.
site.aboutAcademyBody:
Upskill Fleet Academy is a learning initiative focused on helping students and working professionals understand AI, Cyber Security, AWS Cloud, and Financial Markets through practical, real-world training.

Our goal is to bridge the gap between academic learning and industry expectations by sharing knowledge gained from years of experience in technology, cybersecurity, and financial markets.
site.aboutIntro: Learn from experienced practitioners focused on real-world skills—not theory alone.
site.masterclassesIntro: Short, live orientation sessions across our tracks. A simple way to explore AI, Cyber Security, AWS Cloud, or Financial Markets before committing to deeper learning.
site.bootcampsIntro: Structured bootcamps for learners ready to go further. Each track is a premium deep dive into one technology area—with guided hands-on exercises, real-world scenarios, and practical implementation focus.
site.guestFacultyIntro: Guest faculty bring financial markets and investment perspectives into the FMM track.
site.domainsIntro: Four focused tracks—explore through free masterclasses, then deepen your skills in a premium bootcamp.

community.title: Join Our Learning Community
community.body: Get updates on free masterclasses, learning resources, AI tools, cloud technologies, cybersecurity insights, and career guidance.

youtube.title: Learn on YouTube
youtube.body: Watch practical videos on AI, Cyber Security, AWS Cloud, Financial Markets, certification guidance, and career growth.

upcomingHighlight.title: Upcoming Masterclasses
upcomingHighlight.intro: June 2026 weekend sessions — live online. Join free or register interest for updates.

finalCta.title: Start Your Learning Journey
finalCta.body: Join our community, explore practical learning tracks, and stay updated with new sessions and educational content.

masterclasses.title: AI & Generative AI — Getting Started
masterclasses.summary: A practical introduction to AI fundamentals, prompt engineering, and how generative AI is used in real work today.

masterclasses.title: AWS Cloud — Fundamentals & Security
masterclasses.summary: Understand cloud basics, key AWS services, and how security fits into cloud architecture decisions.

masterclasses.title: Cyber Security — Fundamentals & Trends
masterclasses.summary: Security concepts explained in plain language—what matters in industry today and how to start building awareness.

masterclasses.title: Financial Markets & Investing — Introduction
masterclasses.summary: Understand how markets work, key participants, and foundational investment concepts for students and beginners.

bootcamps.title: AI & Generative AI Deep Dive
bootcamps.summary: A structured deep dive into AI and generative AI—from fundamentals to practical application—with guided hands-on exercises.
bootcamps.outcome: Build practical confidence applying AI and generative AI tools in everyday and professional contexts.

bootcamps.title: Cyber Security Deep Dive
bootcamps.summary: Detailed exploration of security fundamentals, cloud security concepts, and industry practices—with hands-on demonstrations.
bootcamps.outcome: Understand how security works in modern organizations and apply concepts through practical exercises.

bootcamps.title: AWS Cloud Deep Dive
bootcamps.summary: Deep dive into AWS cloud fundamentals, core services, architecture, and security—with guided hands-on labs.
bootcamps.outcome: Gain hands-on familiarity with AWS building blocks and security-aware cloud decisions.

bootcamps.title: Financial Markets & Management (FMM) Deep Dive
bootcamps.summary: Structured progression through market fundamentals, investing, risk management, and practical financial analysis.
bootcamps.outcome: Build clarity on markets, investing fundamentals, and practical financial decision-making.

trainers.name: Mr. Gangesh Vats
trainers.title: Lead Instructor — AI, Cyber Security & Cloud Security
trainers.bio: Security Architect and AI Security Professional with 20+ years of experience in cybersecurity, cloud security, platform security, DevSecOps, and enterprise risk management.
trainers.bioSecondary: Having worked across large-scale enterprise environments, I bring practical insights that help learners understand how security is implemented in real organizations—not just in textbooks.
trainers.shortBio: Security architect and hands-on instructor for enterprise teams and students.

trainers.name: Ms. Manju Vats
trainers.title: Guest Instructor — Financial Markets & Management (FMM)
trainers.bio: Experienced financial markets professional with 15+ years of teaching and industry experience. Specializes in simplifying investment concepts, market operations, risk management, and financial literacy for students and working professionals.
trainers.shortBio: Financial markets educator for students and professionals.

faq.a: Students and working professionals who want practical, real-world learning in AI, Cyber Security, AWS Cloud, or Financial Markets—not just theory.
Join a free masterclass, follow our WhatsApp channel for updates, or register your interest and we will share the next session details.
Masterclasses run on weekends, live online, starting 21 June 2026. Each session is 1–2 hours. Dates are listed on this page and announced in the WhatsApp community.
No. Sessions are beginner-friendly and designed for learners at different stages—from students exploring technology to professionals upskilling in AI and cloud.
Masterclasses are free to join. Premium deep-dive bootcamps are structured programs with hands-on focus—register interest to learn about upcoming cohorts.

faq.q: What is the difference between masterclass and bootcamp?
faq.a: Masterclasses are free 1–2 hour orientation sessions to explore a track. Bootcamps are premium deep dives—structured multi-weekend programs with detailed coverage and guided hands-on exercises in one technology area.

footer.closing: Real-world AI, Cyber Security, AWS Cloud & Financial Markets learning for students and professionals.
